headline: Robinhood Is Down 30% in 2026 While Interactive Brokers Is Up 35%: Here’s Why
summary: The brokerage sector is producing one of the widest divergences of 2026 so far. Robinhood Markets (NASDAQ:HOOD) is down 30% year to date (YTD), while Interactive Brokers Group (NASDAQ:IBKR) is up 36% YTD. That roughly 65-point spread heading into mid-May tells a revealing story about customer mix and revenue durability. HOOD stock closed at $79.05 ...
